underlying_goal: Fix a rule engine bug where a sticky+non-sticky rule (A AND B(S)) returned 1 match instead of 3 in non-CSV mode, then validate and commit the fix
brief_summary: User wanted to fix a sticky-match engine bug; Claude traced it to buildRuleEngineFactory running before entity_optrns parsing, fixed the ordering, validated with all test suites passing, and committed/pushed.
